assertion.name: The Nurses' Health Study + Health Professionals Follow-up Study cohorts
assertion.note: The shared participant backbone of the egg-CVD literature. Hu 1999, Bernstein 2012 and Drouin-Chartier 2020 are analyses of THE SAME PEOPLE over nested follow-up windows (Drouin-Chartier's NHS coronary cases contain Hu's). Both major meta-analyses re-pool them. This node is what the provenance intersection collapses to.
